name: langfuse-noop-tracer
description: Langfuse tracer with no-op fallback: Import langfuse at runtime only when credentials present, use global variable for test patching, silently swallow exceptions to avoid breaking runs

name: tracer-orchestrator-wiring
description: Tracer wired into Orchestrator as optional param: Orchestrator.__init__() accepts tracer: Tracer | None = None. run() calls trace_run() before the state loop, wraps each handler call with span()/end_span(), and calls end_trace() after terminal state. No-op when tracer is None. CLI instantiates Tracer() (no-op without env vars) and passes to Orchestrator.

name: langfuse-usage-audit
description: Langfuse integration is currently inert in normal CLI runs because src/horse_fish/cli.py::_init_components does not instantiate or pass a Tracer into Orchestrator. Highest-value follow-ups are: wire the tracer first, then add generation-level traces for Planner/SmartPlanner CLI model calls, set trace attributes (session_id, tags, metadata), move hard-coded prompts to Langfuse prompt management with trace linking, and emit scores for gate/review outcomes.

name: langfuse-v3-context-managed-observations
description: Langfuse v3 integration should use start_as_current_span/start_as_current_observation plus observation.update()/end() instead of legacy trace()/span() calls. Keep a root orchestrator span open for the full run, attach trace attributes with update_current_trace, and create planner model calls as generation observations under the active context.

name: langfuse-prompt-fallback-and-trace-scores
description: Planner and SmartPlanner prompts can be fetched from Langfuse Prompt Management with local format-string fallbacks via resolve_text_prompt(); attach the returned prompt client to generation observations, and record trace-level scores for run_success, subtask counts, and review gate outcomes via create_score using the active RunTrace trace_id.

name: agent-prompt-tracing-with-langfuse-fallbacks
description: AgentPool.send_task should distinguish three prompt paths: task prompts, fix prompts, and raw passthrough. Task/fix prompts resolve through Langfuse-managed templates with local fallbacks, attach the prompt client to generation observations, and emit agent.task_prompt/agent.fix_prompt generations; raw sends stay literal and emit agent.raw_prompt. Orchestrator should add narrow subtask spans for dispatch, result collection, review, merge queueing, and merge instead of one long-lived subtask span.

title: Use explicit retry counters for Langfuse run scores
rationale: Retry and merge-conflict Langfuse scores should be tracked as explicit per-run orchestrator counters rather than inferred from final subtask state, because a merge failure can otherwise look identical to an exhausted gate-retry path.

outcomes.test_results: pytest tests/test_pool.py tests/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_planner.py tests/test_smart_planner.py tests/test_observability.py -q

name: standalone-agent-lifecycle-spans
description: Agent lifecycle work that can happen outside an explicit RunTrace, such as spawn/respawn readiness waits, should use Tracer.span(None, ...) so Langfuse can attach the observation to the current context when present without requiring a synthetic run trace. Orchestrator retry paths should emit dedicated subtask.stall_recovery and subtask.gate_retry spans instead of overloading dispatch or review spans.

outcomes.test_results: pytest tests/test_pool.py tests/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_planner.py tests/test_smart_planner.py tests/test_observability.py -q

name: agent-execution-probe-spans
description: Repeated execution-loop probes in AgentPool should emit dedicated agent.check_status and agent.collect_result spans, using standalone tracer spans so they attach under the current Langfuse context when called from orchestrator polling. Record compact liveness and result metadata such as state, output presence, diff presence, and output/diff sizes instead of full pane contents.

outcomes.test_results: pytest tests/test_pool.py tests/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_planner.py tests/test_smart_planner.py tests/test_observability.py -q

name: regex-runtime-output-observations
description: When runtimes do not expose structured events, parse captured pane output with bounded regex rules to emit best-effort Langfuse observations for runtime tool calls and interactive prompts. Deduplicate observations per agent session so repeated poll snapshots do not flood traces, and prefer compact excerpts plus event names over full pane contents.

outcomes.test_results: pytest tests/test_pool.py tests/test_runtime.py tests/test_orchestrator.py tests/test_planner.py tests/test_smart_planner.py tests/test_observability.py -q
